fields.label: Macro Name
fields.description: Short name shown in the Macros list, e.g. 'Month-end audit'.

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: When off, the macro is a draft: hidden from the run menu and skipped by the scheduler.

fields.label: Stop on Error
fields.description: When on, a failed step aborts the run. When off, the run continues to the next step.

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Optional one-line summary of what this macro does.

fields.label: Steps
fields.description: Ordered list of prompts run one per agent turn.

fields.label: Merged Prompt
fields.description: LLM-summarized single prompt; when set, runs instead of the step sequence

fields.label: Merge Status
fields.description: Background summarization state; run is blocked while pending

fields.label: Merge Conversation
fields.description: Throwaway conversation whose turn produces the summary

fields.label: Time of day
fields.description: Local time the scheduled run fires (defaults to 09:00 if unset).
